title: Immersive Journey
description:
Enjoy exploring this magical world,
adds an RPG like experience.
body:
# Immersive Journey **This modpack adds a variety of mods and new experience to the game have fun exploring this magical world.**
More details **Some features :** >**There is a new mobs and massive [structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise) to explore.** >**There is a new [combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat 'better combat mod') mechanic and a simple [progression](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz 'levelz mod') system.** >**Some mobs [could be tough to deal with](https://modrinth.com/mod/eldritch-mobs 'don`t panic if you got one shotted by a zombie') be ready.** >**Portals are actually [portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals 'immersiveportals mod') now.** >**Ender [dragon fight](https://modrinth.com/datapack/true-ending 'isn`t that glorious 😆') is now very Epic.** >**You might encounter some [minibosses](https://modrinth.com/mod/mutant-monsters 'more challenges = more fun am I right 🙂') have fun.** **In other words, it's like an RPG game that is impossible for casuals to beat.**
# Performance? **This modpack is lightweight it should work even on low spec PC.** ### Ram allocation? It works just fine with 2.5GB allocated **but you might encounter lag spikes while opening a new portal.** #### **I recommend allocating 4GB for a better experience.**
Have Performance Issues? ### Have Problems with leaves density?
Dense Leaves ![remove better leaves](https://github.com/FunnyDev-github/Immersive-journey/blob/main/Images/performance/0.jpg?raw=true)

Firstly remove "Better Leaves" resourcepack

![fast graphics](https://github.com/FunnyDev-github/Immersive-journey/blob/main/Images/performance/1.jpg?raw=true)

Then put your graphics on fast
Or just leaves on fast

### Have Problems in the Nether?
Nether? ![nether lite](https://github.com/FunnyDev-github/Immersive-journey/blob/main/Images/performance/2.jpg?raw=true)

Use one of the "Nether Lite" resourcepacks as you need


This option is available only in "v_0.6" and above

and most likely the issue is caused by the particles so this option will not affect that much

![particles](https://github.com/FunnyDev-github/Immersive-journey/blob/main/Images/performance/3.jpg?raw=true)

So if you still have issue change particles to minimal

# Mods & Resourcepacks **You will find everything I used under versions tab.**
Other mods/resourcepacks used **Mods from other sources.** >[Identity Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/identity) >[Majrusz's Progressive Difficulty](https://modrinth.com/mod/majruszs-progressive-difficulty) >[Guard Villagers (Fabric/Quilt)](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers-(fabricquilt)) **Resourcepacks from other sources.** >[Ender Dragon Revamp](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/ender-dragon-revamp)
Mods I recommend **Some mods you might wanna tryout.** >**If you want to play online with your friend I encourage you to try [simple voice chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) and you might wanna try [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc) it makes the process much easier.** 😉
# Spoiler Alert
Spoilers

This fight will be tough are you ready

Oh and you get blown away each hit...
yeah have fun dealing with that😀

![Did you think the Ender dragon was the only threat?](https://github.com/FunnyDev-github/Immersive-journey/blob/main/Videos/0.jpg?raw=true)

Did you think the Ender dragon was the only threat?
